---
applyTo: "**"
---

## Response style

- Prefer short bullets, direct answers, and exact file paths or commands.
- Summaries should state status, validation run, and anything unverified.
- Avoid repeating large sections of `AGENTS.md`; point back to it instead.
- Use plans only when the user asks for a plan or implementation approach.
- Keep repo guidance concise and high-signal.
